{"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so duplicate refreshes for the same tenant coalesce, while refreshes for different tenants can still run in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"","message_id":"auth_fact_3"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex was rejected because unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing retry global mutex","markdown parser docs cleanup","FLAG_AUTH_QUEUE_ROLLBACK"]}
